string-array.name: airplane_mode_messages
string-array.item: You can\'t even go offline without making a scene, can you! ✈️👑
Airplane mode: even queens need to fly drama-free… just kidding, the drama travels with you. ✈️
Airplane mode? Honey, your rivals are still on the ground gossiping. Don\'t disconnect for too long. 👀
Taking off with attitude! Let the plane tremble before your presence, queen. 💅✈️
Airplane mode on. Your enemies are seizing the moment to talk behind your back. Just a heads-up. ☕
